title: Probabilistic Sketch
description: Schema representing a probabilistic data structure (sketch) configuration and result

id.description: Unique identifier for the sketch instance

name.description: Human-readable name for this sketch instance

description.description: Description of what this sketch is measuring

errorRate.description: Target false positive or error rate (e.g., 0.01 for 1%)

confidence.description: Confidence level for the error bound (e.g., 0.99 for 99%)

width.description: Width of the sketch matrix (Count-Min Sketch)

depth.description: Depth (number of hash functions) of the sketch matrix

capacity.description: Expected capacity (number of distinct items) for Bloom Filter

k.description: Parameter k (e.g., top-k items for Top-K sketch, or nominal entries for Theta Sketch)

estimate.description: The primary estimated value (cardinality, frequency, quantile, etc.)

upperBound.description: Upper bound of the estimate at the configured confidence level

lowerBound.description: Lower bound of the estimate at the configured confidence level

exactResult.description: Whether this result is exact (below sampling threshold) or estimated

memoryUsage.description: Memory used by this sketch in bytes

itemCount.description: Number of items that have been added to the sketch

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the sketch was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the sketch
